title: senecio neodenticulatus
intro: Senecio neodenticulatus, also known as New Zealand fireweed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Senecio neodenticulatus include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Senecio neodenticulatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
